{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603241019396B60DB5585DDE31E1DB3"}"},"total":165},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7602640196065755966","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"震撼美味，超爽！主角和马甲们的互动非常好吃啊，节奏偏快，马甲们的扮演度长得也很快，不会一直讲一个角色让人觉得无聊，作者还会在“本章讨论”发角色设定，强推！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770129810,"group_id":"7552406168178543641","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"忘情浅浅溪中鸟，不雨深深洞底龙","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N01lAHrwDyGrUcrQnQs57NE=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/212557b147e749d6b49c60a3e5f73faa~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776877603&x-signature=p%2BwuzsxjkCClRqiGoupuR%2Bq54DY%3D","user_id":"694493600821374","user_name":"浅雨屿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"694493600821374","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1770965178,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":33,"name":"巅峰品鉴官","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7552406168178543641","book_info":{"abstract":"【评分刚出有点低会涨上去的】
【高亮：无cp但主角万人迷+马甲文+救世组织+并非幕后+无脑小白文】
————
夜十七，一名成年后不知为何开始体弱多病，把医院当成家住的“普通人”。
感受着日渐虚弱的身体，在感慨自己可能要死的瞬间，天空一声巨响，救世马甲系统闪亮登场，并对夜十七发出了绑定申请。
于是，这个经历着诡异复苏，毁灭倒计时两年的世界，迎来的祂的希望之光....
【“小爷我这就把它们烧成灰！”】——攻击力点满的暴躁马甲1号沈斯年。
【“不好意思啊，我们家小少爷让我早去早回。”】——痞帅大叔马甲2号叶无痕。
【“愿意为您效劳，主君。”】——沉稳冷静的马甲3号玄之。
等等.....
一个又一个强大的存在出现在世人面前，名为诡异复苏的灾难，似乎也不再可怕....
————
【众生】，一个在突然出现的神秘组织。
他们说：“我们为拯救、为庇护、为未来而来。”
而在这一切的背后，创造了【众生】与一切的夜十七只是微微一笑：“是的，我就是救世主。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d6f2998086e7f2e3a7e86035b9308c2","author":"钮钴禄阿川","author_id":"","book_id":"7552406168178543641","book_name":"马甲强的没边，本体更是无敌！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7552406209354023449","read_count":"15612","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"351537"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"171","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,系统,灵异,无女主,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1c53b7e057d64182a1dca423aea46501~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779502779&x-signature=qMmAU9M2ALevjO9SJm7K0sNRO6o%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109216298897","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"38"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603241019396B60DB5585DDE31E1DB3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"f
